Components / Bootstrap

Toasts

Lightweight notifications that auto-dismiss. Position with .toast-container and Bootstrap position utilities. Requires JS initialization.

Voyadores just now
Hello! This is a live toast notification.
✓ Record saved successfully.
✕ Failed to save. Please try again.
<!-- Toast container (fixed position) -->
<div class="toast-container position-fixed bottom-0 end-0 p-3">

  <!-- Default toast -->
  <div id="myToast" class="toast" role="alert"
    aria-live="assertive" aria-atomic="true">
    <div class="toast-header">
      <strong class="me-auto">Voyadores</strong>
      <small>just now</small>
      <button type="button" class="btn-close"
        data-bs-dismiss="toast" aria-label="Close"></button>
    </div>
    <div class="toast-body">Hello, world!</div>
  </div>

  <!-- Colored (no header) -->
  <div class="toast align-items-center text-bg-success border-0" role="alert">
    <div class="d-flex">
      <div class="toast-body">Saved successfully!</div>
      <button type="button" class="btn-close btn-close-white me-2 m-auto"
        data-bs-dismiss="toast" aria-label="Close"></button>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>
// Show a toast
const toastEl = document.getElementById('myToast');
const toast = new bootstrap.Toast(toastEl, {
  autohide: true,
  delay: 3000, // ms before auto-dismiss
});
toast.show();

// Show and hide manually
toast.hide();
toast.dispose();

// Events
toastEl.addEventListener('shown.bs.toast', () => console.log('Toast shown'));
toastEl.addEventListener('hidden.bs.toast', () => console.log('Toast hidden'));
On this page
